name: L.C. Tu
background: Dr. L.C. Tu is a Vice President and the Chief Information Officer at TSMC. He is responsible for the company's information technology strategy and infrastructure. He joined TSMC in 2003 and has held leadership roles in IT and manufacturing systems.

company_affiliations.name: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, TSMC China (Past); Senior Executive/Management roles (Past/Current)
